title: lamium maculatum f. subalpinum
intro: Lamium maculatum f. subalpinum is a cultivar of the spotted deadnettle plant, characterized by its unique leaf markings and compact growth habit. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a good night's sleep, due to its sedative and adaptogenic properties. In herbal preparations, Lamium maculatum f. subalpinum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
